zh.lifeSummary: 當Princesa Blanca de Castilla Reina Consorte de Francia於1188年3月4日出生在西班牙卡斯利亞 Y 利安帕倫希亞時，她的父親Rey Alfonso VIII de Castilla32歲，母親Eleanor of England Queen of Castile27歲。她於1200年5月23日與Louis VIII Roi de France在法國豪-諾門迪艾波吉莫特結婚。他們至少是10個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1252年11月27日在法國阿希迪瑟 德 芭黎絲享年64歲，埋葬在法國阿奎泰吉洛德麥布頌。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Princesa Blanca de Castilla Reina Consorte de Francia于1188年3月4日出生在西班牙卡斯利亞 Y 利安帕倫希亞时，她的父亲Rey Alfonso VIII de Castilla32岁，母亲Eleanor of England Queen of Castile27岁。她于1200年5月23日与Louis VIII Roi de France在法国豪-諾門迪艾波吉莫特结婚。他们至少是10个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1252年11月27日在法国阿希迪瑟 德 芭黎絲享年64岁，埋葬在法国阿奎泰吉洛德麥布頌。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Castilla
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Alfredo, Carlos, Raul, Sergio, Jesus, Jorge, Pablo, Ruben, Blanca, Elido, Francisco, Guillermo.
Spanish: habitational name from Castile (Spanish Castilla), a region in central Spain. The name derives from the many castles in the region. This surname is also found in southern France.
History: As an independent kingdom between the 10th and 15th centuries, Castile formed the largest power in the Iberian peninsula.

variants.name: Castiglia
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Salvatore, Angelo, Annamarie, Antonino, Benedetto, Carmine, Francesco, Gaetano, Gennaro, Giacomo, Giuseppe, Ignazio.
Italian: habitational name from Castile (Italian Castiglia) in central Spain (see Castilla ).

nameMeanings.name: Blanca
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.description: The Christian territory controlled the Kingdoms of Aragon, Navarre, and Castile.

en.lifeSummary: When Princesa Blanca de Castilla Reina Consorte de Francia was born on 4 March 1188, in Palencia, Castilla y León, Spain, her father, Rey Alfonso VIII de Castilla, was 32 and her mother, Eleanor of England Queen of Castile, was 27. She married Louis VIII Roi de France on 23 May 1200, in Port-Mort, Eure, Upper Normandy, France. They were the parents of at least 10 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 27 November 1252, in Archdiocese of Paris, France, at the age of 64, and was buried in Maubuisson, Gironde, Aquitaine, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Princesa Blanca de Castilla Reina Consorte de Francia est née le 4 mars 1188, à Palencia, Castilla y León, Espagne, son père, Rey Alfonso VIII de Castilla, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Eleanor of England Queen of Castile, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé Louis VIII Roi de France le 23 mai 1200, à Port-Mort, Eure, Haute-Normandie, France. Ils ont eu au moins 10 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 27 novembre 1252, à Archidiocèse de Paris, France, à l’âge de 64 ans, et a été enterrée à Maubuisson, Gironde, Aquitaine, France.

de.Gutierre-Muñoz, Ávila, Castilla y León,: Gutierre-Muñoz, Ávila, Castilla y León, Spanien
de.lifeSummary: Als Princesa Blanca de Castilla Reina Consorte de Francia am 4. März 1188 in Palencia, Castilla y León, Spanien geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Rey Alfonso VIII de Castilla 32 und ihre Mutter Eleanor of England Queen of Castile 27. Sie hat am 23. Mai 1200 in Port-Mort, Eure, Haute-Normandie, Frankreich Louis VIII Roi de France geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 10 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 27. November 1252 im Alter von 64 Jahren in Archidiocèse de Paris, Frankreich und wurde in Maubuisson, Gironde, Aquitaine, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Princesa Blanca de Castilla Reina Consorte de Francia è nata il il 4 marzo 1188 nel Palencia, Castilla y León, Spagna, sua padre, Rey Alfonso VIII de Castilla, aveva 32 anni e sua madre, Eleanor of England Queen of Castile, aveva 27 anni. Lei sposato Louis VIII Roi de France il 23 maggio 1200, nel Port-Mort, Eure, Haute-Normandie, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 10 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 27 novembre 1252, nel Archidiocèse de Paris, Francia, all'età di 64 anni, e fu sepolta a Maubuisson, Gironde, Aquitaine, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Princesa Blanca de Castilla Reina Consorte de Franciaが1188年3月4日にスペインカスティラ イ レoンプアレンシアで生まれた時，父Rey Alfonso VIII de Castillaは32歳，母Eleanor of England Queen of Castileは27歳であった。1200年5月23日にフランスハウテ-ノーマンディエウアポルト-モートでLouis VIII Roi de Franceと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも10人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1252年11月27日にフランスアーチディオクeゼ ド パーイスで64歳で死去し，フランスアクイティアインギロンドマウブイソンにて埋葬された。

ko.Gutierre-Muñoz, Ávila, Castilla y León,: 스페인 카스틸라 와이 레o a빌라 굿이레-무n즈
ko.lifeSummary: Princesa Blanca de Castilla Reina Consorte de Francia(이)가 1188년 3월 4일 스페인 카스틸라 와이 레o 파렌샤에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Rey Alfonso VIII de Castilla(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Eleanor of England Queen of Castile(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 1200년 5월 23일 프랑스 하테-노먼디 우르 포트-모르트에서 Louis VIII Roi de France(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 열 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1252년 11월 27일 프랑스 아치디오ce스 데 파리스에서 64세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 아키테인 지론드 모버이슨에 묻혔다.

pt.4 March 1188–27 November 1252: 4 de março de 1188–27 de novembro de 1252
pt.Gutierre-Muñoz, Ávila, Castilla y León,: Gutierre-Muñoz, Ávila, Castilla y León, Espanha
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Princesa Blanca de Castilla Reina Consorte de Francia nasceu em 4 de março de 1188, em Palencia, Castilla y León, Espanha, seu pai, Rey Alfonso VIII de Castilla, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Eleanor of England Queen of Castile, tinha 27 anos. Ela casou-se com Louis VIII Roi de France em 23 de maio de 1200, em Port-Mort, Eure, Haute-Normandie, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 10 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 27 de novembro de 1252, em Archidiocèse de Paris, França, com 64 anos, e foi sepultada em Maubuisson, Gironde, Aquitaine, França.

ro.Gutierre-Muñoz, Ávila, Castilla y León,: Gutierre-Muñoz, Ávila, Castilla y León, Spania

ru.Gutierre-Muñoz, Ávila, Castilla y León,: гутиирре-муnоз, aвила, кастилла и леoн, Испания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Princesa Blanca de Castilla Reina Consorte de Francia родилась 4 марта 1188 г. в местности пеиленся, кастилла и леoн, Испания, её отцу по имени Rey Alfonso VIII de Castilla было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Eleanor of England Queen of Castile, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Louis VIII Roi de France 23 мая 1200 г. в местности порт-морт, эур, хауте-норманди, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 10 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла 27 ноября 1252 г. в местности арчидиокeс де пэрис, Франция в возрасте 64 лет и была похоронена в местности маубуиссон, гиронд, аквитеин, Франция.

es.4 March 1188–27 November 1252: 4 de marzo de 1188–27 de noviembre de 1252
es.Gutierre-Muñoz, Ávila, Castilla y León,: Gutierre-Muñoz, Ávila, Castilla y León, España
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Princesa Blanca de Castilla Reina Consorte de Francia nació el 4 de marzo de 1188, en Palencia, Castilla y León, España, su papá, Rey Alfonso VIII de Castilla, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Eleanor of England Queen of Castile, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Louis VIII Roi de France el 23 de mayo de 1200, en Port-Mort, Eure, Haute-Normandie, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 10 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 27 de noviembre de 1252, en Archidiocèse de Paris, Francia, a la edad de 64 años, y fue sepultada en Maubuisson, Gironde, Aquitaine, Francia.
